topic: Noah's Ark and the Great Flood

script.title: Noah's Ark and the Great Flood 🌈 | Bible Story for Kids

scenes.narration: Long ago, the world had become very unkind. But one man named Noah loved God with all his heart, and God loved Noah very much.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of a kind elderly man named Noah with a white beard, smiling warmly in a green meadow, bright blue sky with fluffy clouds

scenes.narration: God told Noah to build a giant boat called an Ark. It would be enormous — big enough for Noah's family and two of every animal on Earth!
scenes.image_prompt: Cheerful storybook illustration of Noah building a huge wooden ark, hammering planks with a big smile, surrounded by colorful tools and wood chips, sunny day

scenes.narration: Animals came from everywhere — elephants, giraffes, lions, butterflies, and tiny little ladybugs. They all walked right up the ramp into the Ark!
scenes.image_prompt: Bright whimsical storybook illustration of pairs of colorful animals — elephants, giraffes, zebras, and butterflies — marching happily in a line up into a giant wooden ark

scenes.narration: Then the rain began to fall. Drip, drip, drip — then whoosh! Water covered the whole land. But Noah and all the animals were safe inside.
scenes.image_prompt: Cozy storybook illustration of Noah's big wooden ark floating safely on a stormy sea, rain falling in soft lines, warm golden glow coming from the ark's window, cute animals peeking out

scenes.narration: For forty days and forty nights the rain fell. Noah and his family trusted God, taking care of all the animals and keeping everyone calm and warm.
scenes.image_prompt: Warm cheerful storybook illustration of Noah's family inside the ark feeding happy animals — lions, bunnies, birds — with lantern light glowing, everyone smiling and cozy

scenes.narration: Finally, the rain stopped. Noah sent out a dove, and it came back carrying an olive branch — a sign that dry land was near!
scenes.image_prompt: Beautiful soft storybook illustration of a white dove flying back toward the ark with a green olive branch in its beak, golden sunlight breaking through parting clouds above calm water

scenes.narration: The Ark came to rest on a mountain. The waters went away, and Noah, his family, and every animal stepped out onto green, fresh land again.
scenes.image_prompt: Joyful bright storybook illustration of Noah and his family stepping off the ark onto green grass, colorful animals running and leaping happily around them, mountains in the background

scenes.narration: God put a beautiful rainbow in the sky — a promise to always love and protect us. Whenever you see a rainbow, remember: God keeps His promises!
scenes.image_prompt: Stunning colorful storybook illustration of Noah's whole family and all the animals looking up at a giant bright rainbow arching across a blue sky, everyone smiling with wonder and joy
